caption: Three people are seated in gold-framed chairs on a stage against a dark blue background featuring neon purple accents. On the left, a man with a beard wearing a white button-down shirt and black trousers gestures with his hands while speaking. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and black trousers, listening with her hands resting in her lap. To the right, a man in a grey suit and light blue shirt sits with his legs crossed. A white, textured, cubic object resembling a stylized piece of technology sits on the floor in front of the first man. Throughout the sequence, the man on the left continues to gesture and speak, while the other two remain relatively still, looking toward him. There is no legible on-screen text or logos visible in the frames.
